zh.lifeSummary: 當Lorentz Kieffer於1578年3月21日出生在德國爾特波格比格奧頓豪森時，他的父親Matthis Keifer38歲，母親Magdalene Schneider35歲。他於1608年8月22日與Maria Schaefer在德國爾特波格比格奧頓豪森結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lorentz Kieffer于1578年3月21日出生在德国爾特波格比格奧頓豪森时，他的父亲Matthis Keifer38岁，母亲Magdalene Schneider35岁。他于1608年8月22日与Maria Schaefer在德国爾特波格比格奧頓豪森结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Kieffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Luxembourgish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Kiefer . The surname Kieffer is also found in the province of Luxembourg and elsewhere in Wallonia (Belgium).

variants.name: Kiefer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Franz, Erwin, Heinz, Dieter, Fritz, Alois, Aloys, Claus, Ernst, Florian, Frieda.
German: occupational name for a cooper or the overseer of a wine cellar, from an agent derivative of Middle High German kuofe ‘vat, barrel’ (from Latin cupa).
German: possibly also from an agent derivative of Middle High German kiffen ‘to quarrel’, hence a nickname for a bickerer.

nameMeanings.name: Lorentz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Laurence
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

en.lifeSummary: When Lorentz Kieffer was born on 21 March 1578, in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Matthis Keifer, was 38 and his mother, Magdalene Schneider, was 35. He married Maria Schaefer on 22 August 1608, in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lorentz Kieffer est né le 21 mars 1578, à Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Matthis Keifer, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Magdalene Schneider, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Maria Schaefer le 22 août 1608, à Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lorentz Kieffer am 21. März 1578 in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthis Keifer 38 und seine Mutter Magdalene Schneider 35. Er hat am 22. August 1608 in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Deutschland Maria Schaefer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lorentz Kieffer è nato il il 21 marzo 1578 nel Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Matthis Keifer, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Magdalene Schneider, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Maria Schaefer il 22 agosto 1608, nel Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Lorentz Kiefferが1578年3月21日にドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセンで生まれた時，父Matthis Keiferは38歳，母Magdalene Schneiderは35歳であった。1608年8月22日にドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセンでMaria Schaeferと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lorentz Kieffer(이)가 1578년 3월 21일 독일 wu르테버그 니우브u르그 오텐하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthis Keifer(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Magdalene Schneider(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1608년 8월 22일 독일 wu르테버그 니우브u르그 오텐하우센에서 Maria Schaefer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lorentz Kieffer nasceu em 21 de março de 1578, em Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Matthis Keifer, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Magdalene Schneider, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Schaefer em 22 de agosto de 1608, em Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lorentz Kieffer родился 21 марта 1578 г. в местности оттенаусен, неуенбuрг, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Matthis Keifer было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdalene Schneider, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Schaefer 22 августа 1608 г. в местности оттенаусен, неуенбuрг, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lorentz Kieffer nació el 21 de marzo de 1578, en Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Matthis Keifer, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Magdalene Schneider, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Maria Schaefer el 22 de agosto de 1608, en Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
